milestones.title: Further reduce Haiku 4.5 synthesis time in async Lambda (currently 23.4s avg)
milestones.quickPrompt: Lambda is sevaro-reasoning (NOT sam deploy — use bash lambda/reasoning/build.sh then aws lambda update-function-code). Compact prompt active (SYNTHESIS_PROMPT_COMPACT=1). KB=T4W8S8RNMN. See known issue in CLAUDE.md.
